docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,550.87 FILED BY YIM, JERRY AS TO DEFENDANT FRANK, ADRIAAN J ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-04-2007 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT FRANK, ADRIAAN J

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF YIM, JERRY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FRANK, ADRIAAN J $4,550.87 PRINCIPAL, $1,365.00 INTEREST, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,965.87 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $1,250.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $1,088.95 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT FRANK, ADRIAAN J
